LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS -- OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 GIVEN THE ALLEGATION IN PARAGRAPHS 33-34. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 GIVEN THE LACK OF ANY ALLEGATIONS THAT THE BANK WAS AWARE OF ANY RACIAL DISCRIMINATION. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS A COMMON LAW RIGHT TO ASSERT HIS DEFENSES TO THE CONTRACT AGAINST THIS ASSIGNEE. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-23-2010 CONTINUED TO JUN-04-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO FILE AND SERVE ORDER RE DEMURRER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Catherine Lee, Esq. of Musick Peeler, 415-281-2024 for defendant and moving party Bank of The West
Bryan Kemnitzer, Esq.of Kemnitzer, Barron & Krieg, 415-632-1900 for plaintiff and opposing party Jose R. Ayala

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 GIVEN THE ALLEGATION IN PARAGRAPHS 33-34. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 GIVEN THE LACK OF ANY ALLEGATIONS THAT THE BANK WAS AWARE OF ANY RACIAL DISCRIMINATION. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3 BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS A COMMON LAW RIGHT TO ASSERT HIS DEFENSES TO THE CONTRACT AGAINST THIS ASSIGNEE. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Off Calendar
